chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-103 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 7775/23 3.For hearing of main case 23-04-2024 Mr. Amjad Ali Almani, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G for the State. Mr. Waheed Ali Samtio, Advocate files power on behalf of respondent No.1, who is also present. O R D E R By consent, impugned order dated 23.08.2023, passed by learned III-Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur in Crl. Complaint No.23 of 2023 is set aside as the same is based on erroneous and irrelevant consideration of sale agreement and civil suit thereon between the parties ignoring completely the fact of alleged dispossession by respondent No.1 and settled principle of law that sale agreement, whose authenticity is yet to be established, creates no right in favour of vendee plus the fact that relevant reports were in favour of the applicant. Accordingly, the matter is remanded to the trial Court to hear the applicant/complainant afresh and pass an appropriate order within a period of 15-days on receipt of this order. This Crl. Revision Application along with listed application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
